task_completion.description: Open the practice log data in LibreOffice Calc
task_completion.visual_evidence: LibreOffice Calc is open displaying the practice log data with columns for Student Name, Weekly Goal, and Weeks 1-4.

task_completion.description: Calculate practice totals for each student
task_completion.visual_evidence: A new column shows the total practice minutes for each student. For example, Emma Johnson should show 510, Marcus Lee 260, and Sophia Chen 250.

task_completion.description: Calculate goal percentages for each student
task_completion.visual_evidence: A new column shows the goal percentage (Total / (Weekly Goal * 4)). For example, Emma Johnson should show ~106%, Marcus Lee ~72%, and Sophia Chen ~41%.

task_completion.description: Determine status categories for each student
task_completion.visual_evidence: A new column shows the status category. Emma Johnson should be 'Excellent', Marcus Lee 'Needs Encouragement', and Sophia Chen 'Urgent Check-in'.

task_completion.description: Apply conditional formatting to the dataset
task_completion.visual_evidence: Cells in the spreadsheet (such as the status or percentage columns) have different background or text colors applied automatically based on their values.

integrity.description: The agent used the LibreOffice Calc GUI
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the LibreOffice Calc interface, not terminal commands or python scripts doing the data processing.

integrity.description: The agent used formulas for calculations
integrity.visual_evidence: The formula bar in LibreOffice Calc shows formulas (e.g., SUM, IF, or arithmetic operations) rather than hardcoded numbers for totals, percentages, or statuses.

integrity.description: The agent used the conditional formatting feature
integrity.visual_evidence: The Conditional Formatting dialog is visible in the trajectory, or formatting rules are consistently applied across many rows, indicating it wasn't colored manually cell-by-cell.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The dataset contains 15 students with 4 weeks of data. Two students (Marcus Lee and Mia White) have missing Week 3 data. Expected calculations for sample students: Emma Johnson (Total: 510, Percentage: 106.25%, Status: Excellent), Marcus Lee (Total: 260, Percentage: 72.22%, Status: Needs Encouragement), Sophia Chen (Total: 250, Percentage: 41.67%, Status: Urgent Check-in). Status thresholds: Excellent (≥100%), On Track (80-99%), Needs Encouragement (50-79%), Urgent Check-in (<50%).
